name: msprods-platform
description: MS Prods SaaS platform with web app, API, Airtable Brain, Stripe, Supabase security scaffolding.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && find apps src security database -name "*.js" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check && node --check public/chat-widget.js
